system.description:
### Tier 3 Social/Special A genetic variant of the Asari who dominates victims psychically and burns their nervous system. Motives & Tactics: Seduce, dominate, terrorize

#### Features Dominate Mind - Action: The Ardat-Yakshi locks eyes with a target. The target must make a Presence Reaction Roll. On a failure, they must mark 3 Stress, they gain immediately the Spotlight, and the GM chooses their next action (must be an attack against an ally or a move away from the objective).

Embrace Eternity - Action: Make an attack against a Restrained or Vulnerable target at Melee range. If successful, deal 5d10 ene damage. The Ardat-Yakshi clears 2 HP and 2 Stress as she drains the target’s life force.

Aura of Terror - Passive: Any target starting their action within Close range of the Ardat-Yakshi must mark 1 Stress or have Disadvantage on all rolls.

}}
